final_text:
The full finance pack page is now clear. It contains "Commercial indicators" as a section header immediately above the "Qualified pipeline | 13.510" row, and ends with "Final restatement, approved 15 July 2026." This confirms: (1) the finance pack's "Qualified pipeline" IS the commercial pipeline (same metric as the claim), and (2) the finance pack v2 is explicitly the final/restated authoritative version — but that restatement note only orders v1→v2 within the finance-pack lineage; it does not mention or supersede the regional review. The regional review meanwhile explicitly flags "Regional pipeline uses local CRM" — a different measurement basis, which per the rules is a competing value (not a scope distinction), and a basis-difference flag signals no authority ordering is established.

So: two current Q2 2026 values for the same commercial-pipeline metric — 13.053M (regional, local-CRM basis, rank 4, matches claim) vs 13.510M (finance pack, rank 1, explicitly restated/final) — with no explicit cross-document supersession or reconciliation. The verdict is ambiguous.
